Notes: UWO ranked 15th in the NCAA Div. III by D3hoops.com...UWO's 11th straight win
over UWP...UWO never trailed and led by as many as 31 points (74-43 with 2:23
left in game)...20-4 run gives UWO 36-16 lead with 2:06 left in second period
...UWO's Schneider has 17 points, Samuels 10 points and 11 rebounds.
Game.Officials: Erik Aellig,  Jodi Duffe,  Blaine Hilgendorf
